creator: perky@python.or.kr
text:
I'm sorry but my patch was wrong.
Include/python.h was case mistake of Include/Python.h

here is the patch:

diff -ruN stackless_python.orig/Makefile stackless_python/Makefile
--- stackless_python.orig/Makefile	Thu Mar 29 22:18:53 2001
+++ stackless_python/Makefile	Fri Mar 30 00:55:59 2001
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	python
 PORTVERSION=	2.0
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	lang python
 MASTER_SITES=	""	# python port will override this, but it's for portlint
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	stackless_
@@ -14,7 +15,7 @@
 PATCH_SITES=	http://www3.kr.freebsd.org/~perky/distfiles/ \
 		http://www2.freebsd-kr.org/~perky/distfiles/ \
 		ftp://ftp2.python.or.kr/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/
-PATCHFILES=	stackless-010223.diff.gz
+PATCHFILES=	stackless-010223_1.diff.gz
 PATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
 
 MAINTAINER=	perky@python.or.kr
@@ -25,7 +26,6 @@
 COMMENT=	${.CURDIR}/pkg-comment
 DESCR=		${.CURDIR}/pkg-descr
 MD5_FILE=	${.CURDIR}/distinfo
-PLIST_SLAVE=	${.CURDIR}/pkg-plist.add
 
 SETUP_LOCAL+=	../../../lang/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}/files/Setup.stackless  # relative from python port
 
diff -ruN stackless_python.orig/distinfo stackless_python/distinfo
--- stackless_python.orig/distinfo	Thu Mar 29 22:18:53 2001
+++ stackless_python/distinfo	Fri Mar 30 01:11:02 2001
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 MD5 (python/BeOpen-Python-2.0.tar.gz) = 8c4a64891d3dc6422df2514c603f0c98
-MD5 (python/stackless-010223.diff.gz) = 2aac9dd230afcd1ced77e881565920c0
+MD5 (python/stackless-010223_1.diff.gz) = ba8c4fcaff16c2dd93d98315cd84aaf0
diff -ruN stackless_python.orig/pkg-plist.add stackless_python/pkg-plist.add
--- stackless_python.orig/pkg-plist.add	Thu Mar 29 22:18:53 2001
+++ stackless_python/pkg-plist.add	Thu Jan  1 09:00:00 1970
@@ -1 +0,0 @@
-include/%%PYTHON_VERSION%%/python.h


Thanx for really quick commit, sobomax. :)
